simple_types.name: Opcode
simple_types.code:
type Opcode is
(
  k_Push_Address,
  k_Push_Value,
  k_Push_Discrete_Value,
  k_Push_Indirect_Value,
  k_Push_Indirect_Discrete_Value,
  k_Push_Discrete_Literal,
  k_Push_Float_Literal,
  k_Push_Float_First,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
,
  …,
  k_Selective_Wait
);

enumeration_literals.name: k_Store_Discrete
enumeration_literals.description: Like Store, but copies only the discrete field.

enumeration_literals.name: k_Swap
enumeration_literals.description: Swap the two items at the top of the stack.

enumeration_literals.name: k_Pop_to_Temp
enumeration_literals.description: Pop top item to a temp register.

enumeration_literals.name: k_Push_Temp
enumeration_literals.description: Push temp register on the stack.

enumeration_literals.name: k_Jump_If_Zero_With_Pop
enumeration_literals.description: Jump if [T].I = 0, always pop  -> general use

enumeration_literals.name: k_Jump_If_Zero_No_Pop
enumeration_literals.description: Jump if [T].I = 0, no pop      -> for "and then"

enumeration_literals.name: k_Jump_If_Non_Zero_No_Pop
enumeration_literals.description: Jump if [T].I /= 0, no pop     -> for "or else"

enumeration_literals.name: k_Load_Block
enumeration_literals.description: Push a composite type's data on the stack.

enumeration_literals.name: k_Load_String_Literal
enumeration_literals.description: Push a string literal's contents on the stack.

enumeration_literals.name: k_Integer_to_Float
enumeration_literals.description: The reverse conversion is done by a k_Standard_Functions

enumeration_literals.name: k_XOR_Boolean
enumeration_literals.description: Special operators, resulting of folding of two or more instructions

enumeration_literals.name: k_Halt_Interpreter
enumeration_literals.description:
Switch off the processor's running loop

Tasking stuff

array_types.name: Object_Code_Table
array_types.code: type Object_Code_Table is array (Natural range <>) of Order;

array_types.name: Opcode_Set
array_types.code: type Opcode_Set is array (Opcode) of Boolean;

array_types.name: Patch_Table
array_types.code: type Patch_Table is array (Positive range <>) of Operand_2_Type;

record_types.name: Debug_Info

fields.name: Line_Number
fields.description: Current block's path (if any). Example: hac-pcode-interpreter.adb.

fields.name: Full_Block_Id
fields.description: Source code file name.         Example: HAC.PCode.Interpreter.Do_Write_Formatted.

record_types.name: Order

fields.name: X
fields.description: Operand 1 is mostly used to point to the static level

fields.name: Y
fields.description:
Operand 2 is used to pass addresses and sizes to the

instructions, or to pass immediate discrete values (k_Literal).

subtypes.name: Atomic_Data_Push_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Atomic_Data_Push_Opcode is Opcode range k_Push_Address .. k_Push_Indirect_Discrete_Value;

subtypes.name: Binary_Operator_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Binary_Operator_Opcode   is Opcode range k_EQL_Integer .. k_XOR_Boolean;

subtypes.name: Calling_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Calling_Opcode          is Opcode range k_Mark_Stack .. k_Update_Display_Vector;

subtypes.name: CASE_Any_Choice
subtypes.code: subtype CASE_Any_Choice         is Opcode range k_CASE_Choice_Value .. k_CASE_Choice_Others;

subtypes.name: CASE_Data_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype CASE_Data_Opcode        is Opcode range k_CASE_Choice_Value .. k_CASE_No_Choice_Found;

subtypes.name: Compare_Integer_Literal_Opcode
subtypes.code:
subtype Compare_Integer_Literal_Opcode is Op_Integer_Literal_Opcode
   range k_EQL_Integer_Literal .. k_GEQ_Integer_Literal;

subtypes.name: Composite_Data_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Composite_Data_Opcode   is Opcode range k_Array_Index_Element_Size_1 .. k_String_Literal_Assignment;

subtypes.name: Fixed_Size_Patch_Table
subtypes.code: subtype Fixed_Size_Patch_Table is Patch_Table (1 .. HAC_Sys.Defs.Patch_Max);

subtypes.name: Jump_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Jump_Opcode             is Opcode range k_Jump .. k_Jump_If_Non_Zero_No_Pop;

subtypes.name: Literal_Push_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Literal_Push_Opcode     is Opcode range k_Push_Discrete_Literal .. k_Push_Float_Last;

subtypes.name: Multi_Statement_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Multi_Statement_Opcode  is Opcode range k_CASE_Switch .. k_FOR_Release_Stack;

subtypes.name: Multiple_Operator_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Multiple_Operator_Opcode is Opcode range k_ADD_Integer_Multiple .. k_ADD_Float_Multiple;

subtypes.name: Op_Float_then_Store_Opcode
subtypes.code:
subtype Op_Float_then_Store_Opcode is Op_then_Store_Opcode
   range k_ADD_Float_then_Store .. k_MULT_Float_then_Store;

subtypes.name: Op_Integer_Literal_Opcode
subtypes.code:
subtype Op_Integer_Literal_Opcode is Special_Operator_Opcode
   range k_ADD_Integer_Literal .. k_GEQ_Integer_Literal;

subtypes.name: Op_then_Store_Opcode
subtypes.code:
subtype Op_then_Store_Opcode is Special_Operator_Opcode
   range k_ADD_Integer_then_Store .. k_MULT_Float_then_Store;

subtypes.name: Operand_1_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Operand_1_Type is Defs.HAC_Integer;

subtypes.name: Operand_2_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Operand_2_Type is Defs.HAC_Integer;

subtypes.name: Operand_3_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Operand_3_Type is Defs.HAC_Integer;

subtypes.name: Special_Operator_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Special_Operator_Opcode  is Opcode range k_MULT_then_ADD_Integer .. k_NOR_Boolean;

subtypes.name: Tasking_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Tasking_Opcode          is Opcode range k_Halt_Interpreter .. k_Selective_Wait;

subtypes.name: Unary_Operator_Opcode
subtypes.code: subtype Unary_Operator_Opcode    is Opcode range k_Integer_to_Float .. k_NOT_Boolean;

constants.name: For_END_Instruction
OK_for_Exception
constants.code:
OK_for_Exception : constant Opcode_Set :=
  (k_Return_Call .. k_Return_Function | k_Halt_Interpreter => True, others => False);

subprograms.name: Dump
Emit_Instruction
Feed_Patch_Table
Patch_Addresses
Patch_Addresses
